idea-plugin.name: Kokedera - Japanese Moss Temple Theme
idea-plugin.description:
Kokedera - Japanese Moss Temple Theme

A meditative dark theme inspired by the moss-covered temple garden Saihō-ji (苔寺) in Kyoto. Deep forest greens, weathered stone, and soft lantern light.

Philosophy

Rooted in 侘寂 (Wabi-sabi) — beauty in imperfection, transience, and incompleteness. No color shouts or demands attention. A quiet space where code can breathe.

Color Metaphors

  • Editor background — Deep shade beneath ancient trees
  • Keywords — Sunlight catching the brightest moss
  • Strings — Warm amber of shōji lanterns at dusk
  • Comments — Weathered stone inscriptions softened by time
  • Types — Dark green cedars standing tall
  • Functions — Fresh bamboo swaying in a gentle breeze
